docket_entries.description: APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
(403/CWW) DONALD BLOOM W/PET. FRED BAKER FOR RESP. THE MATTER IS CONT'D TO 11/17/99 AT 9:30AM FOR RESP COUNSEL TO PREPARE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY TEANNA WARD, CSR #11
CONTINUED(FR 11/9/99), CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-1999 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 403
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE-DOMESTIC VIOLENCE REISSUANCE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-1999 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 403
(403/CWW) DONALD BLOOM FOR PET WHO APPEARED; FRED BAKER FOR RESP WHO DID NOT APPEAR. AFTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING FINDINGS AND ORDERS.
GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT ORDERS A STANDARD CONDUCT RESTRAINING ORDER WITH 100 YARD STAY AWAY, INCLUDING VEHICLE. ADDITIONALLY, RESP MAY NOT
ACE DR.; AND MAGELLAN ST. BETWEEN 12TH AVE. AND MONTALVO. RESP MAY DRIVE ON, IF HE REMAINS ON, PORTOLA ST. AND 19TH AVE. REQUEST FOR FIREARM
RESTRICTION IS DENIED. PET TO PREPARE THE ORDER, ATTACHING THE PORTION OF THE MAP FROM WHICH RESP IS RESTRICTED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797.
RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING-MICROFILMED REEL/BATCH F: 312-11
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE-DOMESTIC VIOLENCE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR NOV-09-1999 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 403
